commands.name: setup
commands.description: Bind platform callbacks and initialize the e-paper panel.

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Stream a full white or black frame to the panel and refresh.

black.description: When true, clear to black. Otherwise clear to white.

commands.name: draw_smile
commands.description: Draw a streamed smile face demo without using a framebuffer.

commands.name: draw_pattern
commands.description: Draw a streamed border/checker test pattern without using a framebuffer.

commands.name: stream
commands.description: Stream a caller-provided 200x200 1-bit frame to the panel. White bits are 1, black bits are 0.

frame.description: Platform-specific frame source that yields 25 bytes for each of 200 rows.

commands.name: refresh
commands.description: Trigger a full display refresh and wait until idle.

commands.name: sleep
commands.description: Put the e-paper controller into deep sleep.
